//: macOS signing config. Merge ONLY when a Developer ID cert is available (Apple Developer Program, $99/yr) — deferred for now, so default builds are UNSIGNED. When you have the cert: add the APPLE_* GitHub secrets AND append this to the build args, e.g. `tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.bundle.conf.json --config src-tauri/tauri.macos-sign.conf.json`. hardenedRuntime + these entitlements let the bundled Python dlopen its OCCT dylibs under notarization.
